title: Aetherite 32x
description:
Best for 1.8 pvp and bedwars.
Makes blocks less cartoony.
body:
# 🎨 Aetherite – PvP Style Resource Pack

**![Aetherite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fce46ffac06a77abdc621da71d07082d23ee7148.png)Aetherite is a vanilla-friendly Minecraft resource pack that focuses on visual and audio style rather than gameplay changes. It slightly refreshes textures, adjusts a few models, and includes small sound tweaks to give the game a cleaner PvP-oriented look and feel.**

## 📦 What does this resource pack include?

- Cleaned and refined item & UI textures

- Minor model adjustments for a more consistent style

- Subtle sound changes to better match the pack’s aesthetic

- A lightweight design that keeps Minecraft recognizable


## ⭐ Why use this pack?

- This pack is for players who want:

- A cleaner and more modern PvP visual style

- Small aesthetic improvements without mods

- A resource pack that works well in both multiplayer and singleplayer


## ℹ️ Important information

- Type: Resource Pack (textures, models, and sounds only)

- Gameplay impact: None

- Server-safe & vanilla-compatible

- Created entirely by me – no reused or stolen assets

- Minecraft version: 1.8.9

>###  All changes are cosmetic only and do not modify mechanics, hitboxes, damage, or player behavior.
